name: IRCTC HDFC Bank Credit Card
exclusions: payment of card fees and other charges
SmartEMI or Dial an EMI transactions
milestoneBenefits: Gift voucher worth Rs 500 every calendar quarter on spends of Rs 30,000 or more
Renewal fee waived on spends of Rs 1,50,000 or more in an anniversary year
additionalBenefits: 5 Reward Points for every Rs 100 spent on IRCTC ticketing website and Rail Connect App
Additional 5% cashback on train ticket bookings via HDFC Bank SmartBuy
1% transaction charge waiver on transactions done on IRCTC ticketing website and Rail Connect App
Gift voucher worth Rs 500 upon activating the card
Complimentary access to select IRCTC Executive Lounges
Rs 1,000 cashback across 200+ brands on the credit card via PayZapp
1 Reward Point for every Rs 100 spent on other eligible spends
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh
